_meta.rule: British-formal 'fancier' naming. Defaults to eBird's IOC name; UK form kept for the Anglo-American clashes (Skua/Jaeger, Guillemot/Murre, Diver/Loon, Brent/Brant, Goosander/Common Merganser, Grey Plover/Black-bellied Plover, Slavonian Grebe/Horned Grebe, Sand Martin/Bank Swallow, Great White Egret/Great Egret, Grey/Gray, Greylag/Graylag, Common Starling).

species.note: UK 'Skua' kept over American 'Jaeger'
Escaped/feral — Holbury garden bird
Feral in UK but recordable — escapee population, not a true wild bird
UK 'Guillemot' kept over American 'Murre'
UK subspecies-level kept over eBird's generic 'Brant'
No eBird record in our hotspots
Feral in UK but recordable — established escapee population, originally from Africa

No eBird record in our hotspots
